summary_zh: 复用原始 Zoom In 视觉电路材料，先建立 feature、circuit 和 intervention 的直觉。
summary_en: Reuse the original Zoom In visual-circuits material to establish intuition for features, circuits, and interventions.

paper_refs.title: Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits

summary_zh: 用小型稀疏 toy model 理解为什么神经元经常不是干净的语义单位。
summary_en: Use a sparse toy model to understand why neurons are often not clean semantic units.

title_zh: 单语义特征与字典学习
summary_zh: 用教学版 SAE 理解从 neuron 视角过渡到 feature 视角的原因与收益。
summary_en: Use a teaching-scale SAE to understand the shift from neuron-centric to feature-centric analysis.

paper_refs.title: Towards Monosemanticity: Decomposing Language Models With Dictionary Learning
Mapping the Mind of a Large Language Model

summary_zh: 在小型可运行实验里展示 feature 如何同时承担读取和干预的角色。
summary_en: Show, in a small runnable experiment, how features can support both reading and intervention.

paper_refs.title: Using dictionary learning features as classifiers

summary_zh: 借助预计算 attribution graph 学会如何阅读 LLM 的局部计算路径。
summary_en: Learn to read local computation paths in an LLM through precomputed attribution graphs.

paper_refs.title: Tracing the thoughts of a large language model

summary_zh: 通过 persona vectors 和前沿阅读，把 interpretability 与 character control 连接起来。
summary_en: Connect interpretability to character control through persona vectors and frontier reading.

paper_refs.title: Persona vectors: Monitoring and controlling character traits in language models
Signs of introspection in large language models
The assistant axis: situating and stabilizing the character of large language models
